notes: Arturia Analog Lab — preset browser/player for the entire V Collection. Exposes 5 Macro controls that adapt per preset. The macros are pre-assigned by each preset designer (e.g. Macro 1=Filter, Macro 2=Reverb). Check the macro labels in the plugin for the current preset.

Macro 1.description: Macro 1 — typically Filter Cutoff or Tone (check plugin label)

Macro 2.description: Macro 2 — typically Filter Resonance or Reverb

Macro 3.description: Macro 3 — typically LFO Rate or Chorus

Macro 5.description: Macro 5 — typically LFO Depth or extra morph

Attack.description: Envelope attack (if exposed by current preset)
